#Generated by VisualGDB project wizard.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.18)
project(build_sdrberry)
set(LIBRARIES_FROM_REFERENCES "")
add_executable(build_sdrberry build_sdrberry.cpp)
target_link_libraries(build_sdrberry "${LIBRARIES_FROM_REFERENCES}")
